positive: A whimsical and stylized arrangement of celestial objects and flora, depicting a crescent moon emerging from a cluster of bioluminescent lavender and indigo blossoms. Include constellations formed by delicate, glowing lines, and small, stylized planets rendered as smooth, geometric shapes. The style should be sophisticated magical realism mixed with Art Nouveau illustrative quality, using deep midnight blues, ethereal purples, and pops of gold gold foil metallic accents. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, with strong negative space around the main elements to allow for clean printing on fabric. Crisp lines, high contrast silhouettes, smooth gradients, suitable for repeating textile pattern art.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, messy, harsh lines, photorealistic, ugly
